zh.lifeSummary: Maud de St. Valery de Braose是Sir Phillip de Braose的女兒，於大約1111年出生在英國英格蘭素可布拉波。她於1137年與Ralph Girnon在英國素可布拉波結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1201年3月20日之前在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Valery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Colette, Pierre, Raoul, Yva.
French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Valery, French form of Latin Valerius (see Valerio ).
Americanized form of Italian   Valerio   or   Valeri  .

variants.name: Vallery
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Leonce, Monique.
habitational name from Vallery in Yonne, once a Gallo-Roman estate, recorded in 1218 as Valerianus.

variants.name: Valerio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Ana, Manuel, Pedro, Mario, Luis, Francisco, Ramon, Ruben, Carlos, Jesus.  Italian Antonio, Angelo, Lucio, Francesco, Maurizio, Niccolo, Romeo, Vito, Amadeo, Anastasio, Aureliano, Carmela.

Spanish and Italian: from the personal name Valerio, from Latin Valerius, a Roman surname ultimately derived from Latin valere ‘to flourish, to be strong and healthy’. The name was borne by several early Christian saints, among them 4th-century bishops of Trier and Zaragoza and 5th-century bishops of Sorrento and of Antibes. Compare Valery .

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

en.lifeSummary: Maud de St. Valery de Braose was born about 1111, in Bramber, Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Phillip de Braose. She married Ralph Girnon in 1137, in Bramber, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 20 March 1201, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Maud de St. Valery de Braoseは約1111年にイギリスイギリススセックスブランバーでSir Phillip de Braoseの娘として生まれた。1137年にイギリススセックスブランバーでRalph Girnonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1201年3月20日以前にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルで死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルにて埋葬された。

ko.Bures Saint Mary, Essex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 맬던 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Maud de St. Valery de Braose(은)는 대략 1111년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 브램버에서 Sir Phillip de Braose의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1137년 영국 수세스 브램버에서 Ralph Girnon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 3월 20일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에 묻혔다.

ru.Bures Saint Mary, Essex, England: малдон ст мэри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Maud de St. Valery de Braose родилась около 1111 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Phillip de Braose. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph Girnon в 1137 г. в местности брэмбир, суссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 20 марта 1201 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
